name: Wallter and Mark
description:
Mannequin_Mark (or just Mark) and Wallter, from Regretevator, happen to be in the same elevator! Watch them argue about wood vs concrete, and decide which building material you will declare your love for.

Or declare your love for both.

Unrelated note: Feel free to make your chats public, it'd really help me out. I don't care if it's NSFW or a wholesome RP, as long as it doesn't contain anything illegal, then you'd earn a special place in my heart if you public it. :)

Image/artist source: Not sure. Please inform me if you find it. *✅

(7/29; stupidsheepdog is the artist!)
creator: eldritchspider
